query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN companyId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as orphans, SUM(CASE WHEN companyId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned FROM contacts;
